title: Gatha Vaibhava
description: Gatha Vaibhava is a fantasy drama that weaves together history, mythology, and destiny. When Purathan and Adhunika meet in the present, they embark on a mystical journey through their past lives from the divine realms of Devaloka to Vasco da Gama's voyage and the coastal lands of pre-independence Karnataka. As echoes of the past resurface, they must unravel their fate. Will love endure across lifetimes, or is history doomed to repeat itself?
